title: Short title
doc_html:
§471.  Short title

This Part of this Chapter shall be known and may be referred to by the short title: "Cooperative Sea Food Marketing Law."

Renumbered from R.S.1950, §12:381 by Acts 1968, No. 105, §3, eff. Jan. 1, 1969.
